text:
In this subchapter:

(1) “Committee” means the cash management committee described in Section 404.122 (Cash Management Committee) , Government Code.

(2) “Credit agreement” has the meaning assigned by Section 1208.001 (Definitions) , Government Code.

(3) “Notes” means tax and revenue anticipation notes issued under this subchapter. The term includes any obligation under a credit agreement.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 201. Gen. Provisions & Admin.
##### § 201.961 — Definitions

In this subchapter:

    (1) “Committee” means the cash management committee described in Section 404.122 (Cash Management Committee) , Government Code.

    (2) “Credit agreement” has the meaning assigned by Section 1208.001 (Definitions) , Government Code.

    (3) “Notes” means tax and revenue anticipation notes issued under this subchapter. The term includes any obligation under a credit agreement.

*Added by Acts 2003, 78th Leg., ch. 1281, Sec. 2, eff. Sept. 1, 2003.*

subsections.text: “Committee” means the cash management committee described in Section 404.122 (Cash Management Committee) , Government Code.
“Credit agreement” has the meaning assigned by Section 1208.001 (Definitions) , Government Code.
“Notes” means tax and revenue anticipation notes issued under this subchapter. The term includes any obligation under a credit agreement.
